ApplyPhysicalDedicatedLine.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency Support](ET/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性).
ApplyPhysicalDedicatedLine.name: Dedicated line name. Supports uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, and special characters -_ /. Must start with a letter. Length: 1–65.
ApplyPhysicalDedicatedLine.isp: Internet service provider. Valid values: ISP_CMCC / ISP_CUCC / ISP_CYC / ISP_OTHER, corresponding to: China Mobile / China Unicom / China Telecom / Other domestic ISP.
ApplyPhysicalDedicatedLine.apType: Line type. Baidu internal users: BAIDU; external users: SINGLE.
ApplyPhysicalDedicatedLine.apAddr: Access point. Valid values: BB / BJYZ / M3A / M3B / M2A / M2B / HKG03 / WHGG / SHWGQ / BDBL, corresponding to: Beijing Haidian / Beijing Yizhuang / Guangzhou Nansha / Shenzhen / Nanjing / Suzhou / Hong Kong / Wuhan Optics Valley / Shanghai / Baoding.
ApplyPhysicalDedicatedLine.userIdc: Remote address in the format: Province|City|District|Location, e.g. Beijing|Municipal District|Dongcheng District|Baidu Technology Park K2.
ApplyPhysicalDedicatedLine.billing: Billing information. Currently only prepaid is supported; defaults to a one-month purchase.
ApplyPhysicalDedicatedLine.billing.paymentTiming: Payment timing. Prepaid (Prepaid) or postpaid (Postpaid). Required when creating an order; not required for renewal orders.
ApplyPhysicalDedicatedLine.billing.reservation: Reservation information. Not required for postpaid; required for prepaid.
ApplyPhysicalDedicatedLine.autoRenew.reservationTimeUnit: Time unit. Value: month. Currently only monthly billing is supported.
ApplyPhysicalDedicatedLine.tags: List of tag key-value pairs to be created.
ApplyPhysicalDedicatedLine.tags.tagKey: Tag key. Supports uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and special characters -_ /. Length: 1–65.
ApplyPhysicalDedicatedLine.tags.tagValue: Tag value. Supports uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and special characters -_ /. Length: 0–65.
